name: OMENTAL INFARCTION
definition: rare cause of self-limiting abdominal pain

demographics.Path: hemorrhagic infarction ← vascular compromise ← (a) tenuous blood supply to right
demographics.Location: commonly RLQ on inferior right side of omentum

dominant_finding: internal heterogeneity ← soft-tissue stranding adjacent to ascending colon
distribution: commonly RLQ on inferior right side of omentum
discriminating_features: solitary encapsulated triangular / oval fatty mass:

internal heterogeneity ← soft-tissue stranding adjacent to ascending colon
whorled pattern of concentric linear fat stranding (in torsion)
